creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
my rawtherapee hangs a lot

I have no idea, if it came with the new version 4.0.9 on august, 8th or if it came since there where some new ports related to rawtherapee (graphic und x11 stuff), after the august, 8th (gtkmm? atkmm?..).

See here: 

http://rotkap.tsdh.org/RT-hangup1.png
http://rotkap.tsdh.org/RT-hangup2.png


- It's freezing the x11 window refreshing
- Sometimes it makes wrong scrollbars, that I cannot scrol down (inside RT)
- Another time rawtherapee has problems to finish "demosaicing" an image

All this strange behavior I did not have bofore.
